title: 绯月鞠
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"0.36377713262160137","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1920/h_1080/50364/842288/2025/8/15/620020.jpg"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_307/h_467/50364/842288/2025/8/15/910475.jpg"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.789fde19d2ffa","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"绯月鞠"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者绯月鞠，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"E-07地下游艺街区手鞠馆绯月馆的主人，贪玩好胜的游戏天才，街区里最出名的麻烦制造者，罗喉忠诚的下属。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"崇尚实力，讲究输赢，认为赢家通吃，相信弱肉强食。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"如果有求于她，就必须在她制定的游戏规则下胜过她，才能赢得她的尊重，换取她的帮助。然而一旦输给了她，往往会为此付出生命的代价。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"起初，她只是地下街区一无所有的流鬼，但凭借以命搏命的勇气，为自己赢得了一套机械义体，摆脱了孱弱的身体，获得了更强的力量。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"之后，依靠自己能力以及手鞠球的技艺在游艺街混出了一番名堂，此后更是摆下擂台，迎接所有人的挑战。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"通过摆擂的方式，她挣下了一大笔钱，并在游艺街里建了一座手鞠馆--绯月馆。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"虽然挑战者不计其数，但没有任何一个人能够正面赢下绯月鞠的魔球，直到罗喉的出现。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"一场未公开的赌约，就这样在二人之间展开。最终，绯月鞠愿赌服输，将自己的自由典押给了罗喉。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"尽管没人知道绯月鞠有过这场失败，但她依然信守自己的承诺，并暗下决心，一定会在未来胜过罗喉一次，赢回自己的自由。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这家伙看上去很不好惹，实际上对承诺很看重，即使只是口头上答应的事情，也会竭尽全力设法做到。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"破序"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/842288/2025/8/15/567145.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"auto","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"22px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]}},{"key":"0.9099e02f2af1c","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"所属势力"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"踯躅街"}]}]}},{"key":"0.41ce1002b410d","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"称号"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"赤月之蹴"}]}]}},{"key":"0.14f327b6b15db","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"性别"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"女"}]}]}},{"key":"0.6eb19b12c8557","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"职业"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"绯月馆馆主"}]}]}},{"key":"0.580b0d8414465","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"身份识别码"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{
